title: geoprumnon mexicanum
intro: Geoprumnon mexicanum, also known as the Mexican prickly poppy, is a species of flowering plant in the poppy family, Papaveraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Geoprumnon mexicanum include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
